file_insights.changes_made: Added custom User model with UserManager and email-based authentication
key_additions: UserManager class with create_user and create_superuser methods
User model inheriting from AbstractBaseUser, PermissionsMixin, TimeStampedMixin, SoftDeleteMixin
User status field with ACTIVE, INVITED, SUSPENDED states
Custom methods: verify_email(), record_login(), suspend(), activate()

patterns_discovered.description: Followed Django best practices for custom user model with AbstractBaseUser and BaseUserManager
patterns_discovered.evidence: UserManager extends BaseUserManager with email-based create_user and create_superuser methods

patterns_discovered.description: User model includes optional organization membership, allowing system/platform users without org assignment
patterns_discovered.evidence: organization ForeignKey with null=True, blank=True, related_name='users'

patterns_discovered.description: User model inherits from SoftDeleteMixin for non-destructive deletion
patterns_discovered.evidence: User inherits SoftDeleteMixin and includes is_deleted property check in is_active_user

patterns_discovered.description: Extensive docstrings for both UserManager and User model with usage examples
patterns_discovered.evidence: Detailed docstrings with Args, Returns, Raises sections and usage examples

patterns_discovered.description: User status field with ACTIVE, INVITED, SUSPENDED states and dedicated methods
patterns_discovered.evidence: status CharField with UserStatus choices, suspend() and activate() methods

patterns_discovered.description: Email verification timestamp and convenience properties for checking verification state
patterns_discovered.evidence: email_verified_at field, is_email_verified property, verify_email() method

patterns_discovered.description: Tracking of last login timestamp for audit and activity monitoring
Strategic index creation on frequently queried field combinations

gotchas_discovered.issue: create_user and create_superuser methods accept password=None, allowing user creation without password
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Documented that password is optional but recommended; system should enforce password requirements at application level

gotchas_discovered.issue: Users can exist without organization association, creating potential for orphaned platform users
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Documented in critical rules; application logic must handle both org-bound and platform users

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Soft delete compatibility with unique constraint
gotchas_discovered.issue: email field has unique=True, but soft-deleted users are not excluded from uniqueness check
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Should consider database-level partial indexes or application-level unique validation excluding deleted records

gotchas_discovered.issue: If USERNAME_FIELD not properly set, Django admin and authentication backends may fail
Newly created users have email_verified_at=None, but no initial verification flow defined
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Application must implement email verification workflow; verify_email() method provided but entry point not specified

approach_outcome.summary: Successfully implemented a production-ready custom User model with email-based authentication following Django best practices
key_achievements: Custom UserManager properly implements email-based user creation
User model correctly inherits from AbstractBaseUser, PermissionsMixin, and project mixins
Multi-tenant support with optional organization membership
Comprehensive field coverage: authentication, identification, verification, audit trails
Soft delete integration for data preservation
Strategic database indexing for query performance
Well-documented with usage examples and critical rules
approach_outcome.completeness: Core user model fully implemented with manager, inheritance chain, and utility methods
approach_outcome.production_readiness: High - follows Django conventions, includes error handling, comprehensive docstrings, and RBAC foundation

recommendations.recommendation: Implement application-level unique validation for email that excludes soft-deleted users to prevent email reuse
recommendations.rationale: database unique constraint doesn't respect soft deletes, allowing deleted users' emails to be reassigned

recommendations.recommendation: Add User model to AUTH_USER_MODEL setting in Django settings.py
recommendations.rationale: Required for Django admin, password reset, and other built-in auth functionality to work correctly

recommendations.recommendation: Define email verification workflow (token generation, verification view, signal handler)
recommendations.rationale: verify_email() method exists but no entry point defined; users need way to verify emails post-signup

recommendations.recommendation: Create comprehensive test suite for UserManager (password hashing, superuser validation, email normalization)
recommendations.rationale: Authentication is security-critical; UserManager logic needs thorough test coverage

recommendations.recommendation: Consider adding password change timestamp and last password change tracking
recommendations.rationale: Supports security policies like mandatory password reset intervals and breach response protocols

recommendations.recommendation: Review index strategy for organization + status queries and add composite index if needed
recommendations.rationale: Common tenant-scoped queries will benefit from optimized index selection

recommendations.recommendation: Document expected signal handlers (post_save for initial_data, etc.) when fully implemented
recommendations.rationale: Signals may be needed for audit logging, notification triggers, or cascade behavior

recommendations.recommendation: Consider adding is_superuser convenience property similar to is_active_user
recommendations.rationale: Improves code readability and consistency in permission checks
